commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a1055735aa1bea1be218e44cdfaeaca73345636d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces hardcoded Claude Code user-agent versions in two Anthropic OAuth request builders with a shared resolver that reads `@anthropic-ai/claude-code/package.json`.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +25. Total +69 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows both Anthropic OAuth request builders still send `claude-cli/2.1.75`; the external Anthropic rejection was not live-rerun because it needs credentialed OAuth access.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof and for fixing the test defects; do not queue a new repair job while this external PR and the linked issue are active.

target.title: fix(anthropic): read claudeCodeVersion at runtime to prevent stale user-agent bearer auth failures
target.author: spric76
